scripts.dev: npm run dev:landing & npm run dev:food-basic & npm run dev:foodlocal-pro & npm run dev:products-local & npm run dev:services-local
scripts.build: npm run build:landing && npm run build:food-basic && npm run build:foodlocal-pro && npm run build:products-local && npm run build:services-local
scripts.install:all: cd landing && npm install && cd ../food-basic && npm install && cd ../foodlocal-pro && npm install && cd ../products-local && npm install && cd ../services-local && npm install
